qa_pairs.question: Where is the Cedar cloud located, and what is its total RAM capacity?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cedar cloud is located at Simon Fraser University and has a total RAM capacity of 7,680 GB.

qa_pairs.question: What are the types and capacities of persistent Ceph storage available on the Béluga cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: The Béluga cloud offers 200 TiB of replicated persistent SSD Ceph storage and 1.7 PiB of erasure coded persistent HDD Ceph storage.

qa_pairs.question: What Linux distributions are supported by the images provided on the Alliance Clouds, and what is the policy regarding End-of-Life (EOL) images?
qa_pairs.answer: Alliance staff provide images for common Linux distributions, including Alma, Debian, Fedora, Rocky, and Ubuntu. While new images are added periodically, older images for Linux distributions past their End-of-Life (EOL) will be removed, meaning they will no longer be available when creating new virtual machines. Users are encouraged to migrate systems to newer releases for ongoing support and security updates.
